project.description: Optional Angular project whose sourceRoot should be used to resolve application source-file targets. When omitted, files are written under /src.

files.description: Per-file hooks for the Angular application source files described at https://angular.dev/reference/configs/file-structure#application-source-files. Each entry accepts exactly one of: `content` (inline body), `path` (local filesystem path read at schematic time), or `template` (literal body whose `{{key}}` placeholders are replaced from `params`).

content.description: Inline file content. Overrides any existing file at the target path.

path.description: Absolute or relative filesystem path read at schematic execution time. Relative paths are resolved against the current working directory.

template.description: Literal template body. Occurrences of `{{key}}` are replaced with the corresponding value from `params`.

params.description: Values used to substitute `{{key}}` placeholders inside `template`. Only used when `template` is provided.
